data.name: 女神降臨的昇天塔
data.detailed_description:
🚅 ADD IN WISHLIST🚅


關於此遊戲

遊戲介紹

本作的目標是要蓋出一座高高的昇天塔

除了嘗試獲得更高的分數以外

讓女神獲得「快感」也是遊戲的主要目標

女神獲得快感之後將會依照分數贈與玩家「女神幣」

在選擇技能時、遊戲結束時、達到高空時,都能看到女神的不同樣貌

遊戲玩法

每當「棒」疊加10層就會彈出技能選擇界面

選擇界面中將會從6種女神技能中隨機出現3種

玩家必須從中選擇一種技能

有些技能的效果會持續到下次選擇技能前

技能的效果會持續到遊戲結束

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel i3 12100
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics 730
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5 12400
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050Ti
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: Tower of Megami Descents
data.detailed_description:
🚅 ADD IN WISHLIST🚅


About the Game

Game introduction

The goal of this game is to build a towering tower of ascension

Besides aiming for higher scores

the main objective of the game is to give the Megami "pleasure"

After experiencing pleasure

the Megami will reward players with "Megami Coins" based on their scores

When choosing skills, during game over, and when reaching high altitude, you can see the different appearances of the Megami

Gameplay

Every 10 layers stacked with "bar" will trigger the skill selection interface

In the selection interface, three out of 6 Megami skills will randomly appear

Players must choose one skill from them

Some skills' effects will last until the next skill selection

While some skills' effects will last until the game over

data.short_description: The goal of this game is to build a tall Ascension Tower. Making the goddess experience "pleasure" is also a main objective. Players can see different appearances of the goddess when selecting skills, at the end of the game, and upon reaching high altitudes.
data.supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows10 / 11
  • Processor: Intel i3 12100
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel UHD Graphics 730
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: Windows10 / 11
  • Processor: Intel i5 12400
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050Ti
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
